name: Sam Dhanalakota
title: SENIOR FULL-STACK ENGINEER
paragraph_primary: {{years}}+ years building production software across security and gaming industries — React frontends, distributed Node.js backends, and cloud infrastructure reaching millions of users globally.
paragraph_secondary: I architect full-stack systems end-to-end - from modular React SPAs to NestJS microservices and AWS infrastructure. I ship faster with AI, using Claude Code, Cursor, and AgentOS as core parts of my engineering workflow - not as experiments.
